items.title: DeepL, known for text translation, now wants to translate your voice
items.summary: DeepL says its tech could be used for real-time translation with meeting tools like Zoom and Microsoft Teams

items.title: Amazon-backed X-energy files to raise up to $800M in IPO
items.summary: Nuclear startup X-energy hit the road today to sell prospective investors on its initial public offering.

items.title: Ford EV and tech chief leaving automaker
items.summary: Doug Field had stints at Apple and Tesla before joining Ford in 2021.

items.title: Wait, could they still actually break up Live Nation?
items.summary: A federal jury found that Live Nation has acted illegally as a monopoly -- but the company just came to a tentative settlement with the DOJ last month.

items.title: Monarch Tractor’s collapse ends with an acquisition by Caterpillar
items.summary: The startup had faced mounting pressure from dealers, farmers, and a co-founder who complained that Monarch's tech didn't work properly.

items.title: OpenAI updates its Agents SDK to help enterprises build safer, more capable agents
items.summary: OpenAI has expanded the capabilities of its agent-building toolkit, as agentic AI continues to grow in popularity.

items.title: Hightouch reaches $100M ARR fueled by marketing tools powered by AI
items.summary: The startup says it grew its ARR by $70 million in just 20 months after launching an AI agent platform for marketers.

items.title: LinkedIn data shows AI isn’t to blame for hiring decline… yet
items.summary: LinkedIn says hiring is down 20% since 2022, but blames higher interest rates — not AI — for the slowdown.

items.title: Feds will require data centers to show their power bills
items.summary: In a first, the U.S. Energy Information Agency said it will require data centers to disclose details of their energy use.

items.title: AI learning app Gizmo levels up with 13M users and a $22M investment
items.summary: Gizmo, an AI-powered learning platform, has attracted more than 13 million users and just secured $22 million in Series A funding.

items.title: Can AI judge journalism? A Thiel-backed startup says yes, even if it risks chilling whistleblowers
items.summary: Objection, a Thiel-backed startup, aims to use AI to judge journalism, letting users pay to challenge stories. Critics warn it could chill whistleblowers and reshape how media accountability works.

items.title: Google rolls out a native Gemini app for Mac
items.summary: You can share anything on their screen with Gemini to get help with what they're looking at in the moment, including local files.

items.title: This Khosla-backed autonomous pod startup just raised $170M — now it’s aiming for more
items.summary: Glydways is in talks to raise another $250 million as it prepares to launch three pilot programs.

items.title: Accel raises $5B to back late-stage bets
items.summary: Accel announced on Tuesday that it raised $5 billion in fresh capital to back late-stage companies building AI.

items.title: India’s vibe-coding startup Emergent enters OpenClaw-like AI agent space
items.summary: Emergent's Wingman lets users manage and automate tasks through chat on platforms like WhatsApp and Telegram.

items.title: Anthropic shrugs off VC funding offers valuing it at $800B+, for now
items.summary: VCs are frothing at the mouth to write more checks to Anthropic at a valuation that matches or beats OpenAI's.

items.title: Motorola sues social platforms and creators over posts, raising speech concerns in India
items.summary: Motorola has sought a permanent injunction restraining the defendants from publishing or sharing what it describes as false or defamatory content about its products, including reviews, videos, comments, and boycott campaigns.

items.title: Airwallex is about to take on Stripe and the rest of the payments industry — in the physical world
items.summary: Airwallex, valued at $8 billion, is launching a point-of-sale product that lets businesses accept in-person payments in multiple countries via a single platform.

items.title: After sale of its shoe business, Allbirds pivots to AI
items.summary: Allbirds is ditching wool sneakers for AI servers, rebranding as NewBird AI after locking in a $50M convertible financing facility.

items.title: Sweden blames Russian hackers for attempting ‘destructive’ cyberattack on thermal plant
items.summary: Sweden's minister for civil defense said Russian hackers are "now attempting destructive cyber attacks against organizations in Europe."
